---
title: "으쓰까빠"
format: html
  code-fold: true
filters:
  - pyodide
---

## Now I can run live Python code right inside my webpage.  Orai.
### You can make changes to the code below, then press the green play button to run it
```{pyodide-python}
import numpy as np
x = np.linspace(0, 10, 100)
print(x[:5])
```

[![Launch VSCode](https://mybinder.org/badge_logo.svg)](https://mybinder.org/v2/gh/sabioresearch/sabioresearch.com/HEAD?urlpath=vscode)
